L. Jain About Faculty Education and Qualification Work Experience Research Details PhD Supervision Publications Projects Testing & Consultancy Other Details Latest News & Events Newsletter January_June_2025_Vol.7 15-07-2025 Signed MOU with Steel Infra Agro( (SIA) Pithampur 16-04-2025 Helica track competition 10-12-2024 'Alumni Photo Gallery' 20-03-2024 View More Dr. M. L. Jain Designation: Professor Employee ID: 0500198 Qualification: PhD, Postdoc USA Date of Joining: 22/02/1991 : 91-731-2582306 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Received his PhD from IITK on 2005, Postdoc from uiuc, USA on 2009, M.Tech. from IITM on 1996 and BE from SGSITS in Mech. Engg. on 1987. His research interest is CAD/CAM/CAE, Reverse Engineering, Design, Biomechanics, Biomodeling, Medical Devices, and Electro-medico instrumentations. He has a total of apx. 30 yrs of teaching and research experience. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1. Visiting Scholar CAD/RE/Biomechanics 2008-2009 uiuc, USA 2. PhD CAD/RE/Biomechanics 2005 IIT Kanpur 3. M.Tech. Biomedical Engineering 1995 IIT Madras 4. BE Mechanical Engineering 1987 SGSITS Indore Work Experience: S. No Designation Department Employer Name Duration of Employment 1. Plant Engineer Industry Lloyed Insulation (I) Pvt. Ltd (W.B.) 2 Yrs apx. 2. Contract Faculty MED SGSITS Indore 2 Yrs apx. 3. Lecturer MED SGSITS Indore 8 Yrs. apx. 4. Senior Lecturer MED SGSITS Indore 3 Yrs apx. 5. Associate Professor BMED,MED SGSITS Indore 5 Yrs apx. 6. Professor MED SGSITS Indore 14 Yrs apx. Research Details: The research interest is lies in the area of CAD, Design & Modeling, Prototyping, Reverse Engineering (RE), Biomechanics & Biomedical Engineering. With these interest and continue working in these areas got the following GRANTS from Govt. of India, under the capacity of Principal Investigator (PI).: (i) Rs.13.4 Lacs (2019): SAMRIDHI Scheme [aicte]- Seed money support for Start-up of Students, (ii) Rs. 5.44 Lacs (2019): GIAN (Global Initiative of Academic Network) [MHRD]- Design & development of advance rehabilitative devices for lower extremities, (iii) Rs. 78.0 Lacs (2018): FIST [dst]- R&D infrastructure development, (iv) Rs. 18.85 Lacs (2017): MARGDARSHAN Scheme [aicte]- Uplifting of teaching/learning process of mentee Institutions, (v) Rs. 6.0 Lacs (2017): MODROB [aicte]- Modernization of Strength of Material Laboratory, (vi) Rs.5.0 Lacs (2017): Unnat Bharat Abhiyan (UBA) Scheme [aicte]- Tricycle development for rural goods management, (vii) Rs. 18.70 Lacs (2006): RPS Scheme [aicte]- 3D modelling of clubfoot deformity of new-born babies. Publications: (I) International/National Journal Publications Selected Journals Publications: Rahul Ghoshal, Umakant Mahajan, M. L. Jain, (2021); “Finite element analysis of Tricycle for Rural transportation regulation:; J/advancement in material engineering, -6, Issues-1, Pp. 19-35, Umakant Mahajan, Rahul Ghoshal, L. Jain; (2021); “Designing and production of low cost Tricycle for Rural product transportation”, J/Recent activities in production; Vol.-6, Issues-1, pp. 1-12, Jain Manak L; Dhande, Sanjay G; Vyas, Nalinaksh S. (2014), “Computer aided diagnosis of human foot’s bones”, International Journal of Biomedical Engineering and Science, (IJBES), Volume 1, No. 1, pp. 17-26 Manak Lal Jain, Sanjay Govind Dhande, Nalinaksh S. Vyas, (2011), “Virtual modeling of an ankle foot orthosis for correction of foot abnormality”, Robotics and computer-integrated manufacturing, Volume 27, Issues 2, pp.164-170, Manak Jain, Sanjay Dhande, Nalinaksh Vyas, (2009), “Biomodeling of clubfoot deformity of babies”, Rapid Prototyping Journal (Impact factor: 8), Volume 15, Issues 3, pp.164-170, Manak Lal Jain, Sanjay Govind Dhande, Nalinaksh Vyas, (2009), “A biomechanical control mechanism for correction of clubfoot deformity in babies”, Int. J. Biomechatronics and Biomedical robotic, Vol. 1, No.1, pp. 51-56, Jain, M.L., Dhande, S.G. and Vyas N.S., (2008), “A virtual environment in the healthcare domain for the management of clubfoot deformity in newborn babies: a case study”, International Journal of Healthcare Technology and Management, 9, No.2, pp. 136 – 142, Jain, M. L., Saraswat, R.C., Sarkar, B. and Arya, L.D., (2008), “Telerehabilitation for a baby’s abnormal foot correction”, International Journal of Healthcare Technology and Management, 9, No.5/6. pp.136-142, Manak Jain, Sanjay Dhande Nalinaksh S. Vyas, (2015), “Computerized rapid prototyping of human foot using computed tomography”; International Journal of design engineering Vol.6 No.2, Pp. 164-171, Suresh Batni and L. Jain, (2008), “Feature based Reverse Engineering of Crank Shaft”, Manufacturing Technology & Research: An International Journal, Vol. 4, No.3&4, pp.42-45, Suresh Batni, M. L. Jain, (2008), “Reverse Engineering of Imported Hedge Trimmer for value analysis”, Valuation Engineering, Suresh Batni, M. L. Jain (2008), “An application of Reverse Engineering in valuation”, Valuation Engineering. (II) International/National Conference Publications Selected Conference Publications: 13. G. Yadav and M. L. Jain; (2021); “Composite materials for orthotics: A review; Innovation in product, process and system design IPPSD-2021, Allied Publishers Pvt. Ltd. India, pp.172-176, 14. Rahul Ghoshal, Umakant Mahajan and M. L. Jain; (2021); “Design and analysis of Tricycle for Rural goods management, Innovation in product, process and system design IPPSD-2021, Allied Publishers Pvt. Ltd. India, pp. 303-311, 15. Umakant Mahajan, Rahul Ghoshal and M. L. Jain; (2021); “Modeling and fabrication of economic Tricycle for Rural goods management”; Innovation in product, process and system design IPPSD-2021, Allied Publishers Pvt. Ltd. India, pp. 294-302, 16. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; “Finite element analysis of clubfoot deformity in newborn baby”, 3D modeling 2003, Paris, France, 17. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; “Integration of CT and Rapid Prototyping to build biomodel of lower extremities”, Workshop on computerized tomography for scientists and engineers, Feb 2004, IIT Kanpur, 18. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; “Biomodeling and finite element analysis of clubfoot corrective procedures in new born babies”, International conference on rapid prototyping and tooling, RPSI 2003, June 2003, Bangalore, 19. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; CT – based biomodelling of human foot, International conference on mathematical biology, February 19 to 21, 2004, IIT Kanpur, India, 20. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; Application of RP and CAD for clubfoot correction, CME on clubfoot August 1, 2004 Akola Maharastra, India, 21. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; “Preliminary study of clubfoot deformity in newborn babies using rapid prototype models”, International congress of biomedical engineering (ICBME)- 2002, Singapore, 22. Jain, Manak, L.; Singh, Megha; “Imaging of tissue structural variations in the sole of human feet by laser backscattering”, 5th National conference on biomechanics (NCB), 1996, IIT Madras, 23. Jain, Manak, L.; Dhande, Sanjay, G.; Vyas, Nalinaksh, S; CT – based biomodelling of human foot, International conference on mathematical biology, February 19 to 21, 2004, IIT Kanpur, India, 24. Suresh Batni, M. L. Jain, (2008), “Reverse Engineering of Imported Hedge Trimmer for value analysis”, Valuation Engineering, 25. Suresh Batni, M. L. Jain (2008), “An application of Reverse Engineering in valuation”, Valuation Engineering. III) Text Books/Chapter published: 26. Manak L. Jain, Sanjay G. Dhande, Nalinaksh S. Vyas; “CT-based biomodeling of human foot”, Mathematical Biology: Recent trends, Peeyush Chandra and B. V. rathish Kumar, 2006, pp. 163-167, Anamaya Publishers, New Delhi, India Google Scholar Link: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pK8lqFMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao Projects: S.No. Project Status 1. AICTE RPS Project; “3D modelling of clubfoot deformity of new-born babies” Completed 2. UBA, Project, “Tricycle development for rural goods management” Completed 3. MODROB, aicte, “Modernization of Strength of Material Laboratory” On-Going 4. AICTE, MARGDARSHAN, “Uplifting of teaching/learning process of mentee Institutions” Completed 5. MHRD, (GIAN), “Design & development of advance rehabilitative devices for lower extremities” Completed 6. AICTE, SAMRIDHI, “Seed money support for Start-up of Students” On-Going 7. DST, FIST Yet to start Testing & Consultancy: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Other Details: List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized 2021, January; First Aid Training workshop for police constables & Ambulance Drivers, in collaboration with Arihant Hospital & Police Dept. 2019, May, One week GIAN course workshop on “ Design & development of advance rehabilitative devices for lower extremities”, 2018, February; One day seminar for FDP on “Teaching and Learning styles in engineering education: Part-I, 2018, August, National workshop on “Reverse engineering and 3D printing, under AICTE Margdarshan Scheme, 2018, April, One day seminar on “Learning approaches, today and futures” for faculty development by Director EMRC, DAVV Indore, 2017, May 05, One day seminar for faculty development programme on “Dress code and lectures plan preparation of engineering subjects and its presentation to students in class” by Director, SGSITS Indore, 2017, May 29, One day seminar for faculty development programme on “Overview of AICTE Margdarshan Scheme” by Director, SGSITS Indore, 2017, March; Two days National Workshop on “Skill development programme on ANSYS”, 2015, March; 3Days National workshop on “Automotive designing using reverse engineering and prototyping”, 2013, October; One day National Workshop on “Optical portable metrology solution in product design, 2011, Nov-Dec.; Two week ISTE Workshop on “Heat Transfer” under the National Mission of education through ICT in collaboration with IIT Bombay, 2011, December; Two Week ISTE Workshop on “Solar Photovoltic” under the National Mission of education through ICT in collaboration with IIT Bombay, Invited Lectures/Expert Talks/Chairmanships at Conferences 2021, March, IPS Indore, aicte & RGPV teacher training programme: “Research & Project related to 3D printing”, 2020, October; International short term Online course (STC) on Recent advances of 3D printing and its bio-medical engineering applications; Organized by North Eastern Hill University, a central university and Royal Global University Guwahati Assam; “Applications of advance technologies in rehabilitation of human deform foot” 2020, August, International Online Workshop, “3D printing technology an additive manufacturing” (IW3DP-2020),”3D modelling and Biomechanical study of human foot”, Research foundation of India & JHERF 2020 January, FDP on Robotic & Automation in collaboration with IIITDM Jabalpur at SAGE University Indore; “ Rapid Product Development FMS” 2019 October, Shri Aurobindo Institute of Technology Indore, Expert talk delivered on “ Rapid Product Development” October 23, 2019 2019 February, IPSA Indore, Session Chaired on International conference on “Recent advances in interdisciplinary trends in engineering & application”, Feb. 14-16, 2019, 2018 May, LNCT Indore expert talk on “ Rapid Product Development in mechanical engineering”, May 25, 2018, 2018 February, IIST Indore, Expert talk on “ Advance manufacturing technologies in mechanical engineering” February 16, 2018, 2016, July, Guna (M.P.), Jaypee University of Engineering & Technology: “Rapid Product Development, 2016, March, Bhopal, LNCT: Product development using Reverse Engineering 2016, March, Jabalpur, Global Engg.
